linting.notes: No linting configuration found. No markdown linters (.markdownlint, .mdlrc, prettier) configured. No pre-commit hooks.

testing.notes: No test infrastructure. This is a documentation-only repository.

advisory_checks.name: Mark stale issues and pull requests

ci.notes: Only one workflow exists (stale.yml) which marks stale PRs, not for validation. No CI checks validate content quality, markdown formatting, or link validity.

build.notes: Documentation-only repository with no build process. Content is markdown files organized in architecture-decision-records/ and documentation/ directories.

conventions.notes: ADR naming: ODH-ADR-{number}-{description}.md. ADRs organized by component subdirectories (operator/, model-serving/, etc.). Template exists at architecture-decision-records/ODH-ADR-0000-template.md. CODEOWNERS requires @opendatahub-io/architects approval for all changes, with component-specific teams for documentation/ subdirectories.

container_recipe.notes: No container validation performed - repository has no executable code, build system, or validation tooling.

validation.summary: No validation performed - documentation-only repository with no automated checks.

gaps: No markdown linting configured (no markdownlint, mdl, prettier, etc.)
No link checking (no broken link validation)
Changes validated only through manual code review via CODEOWNERS
